channel.title: HCI / Accessible & Human-Centered Design :: CS Two Year Refactor
channel.description: Thread: HCI / Accessible & Human-Centered Design Working draft for faculty review. A spiral deepens through escalating passes across blocks. This is the spiral; one of nine spirals (alongside three lenses and one bounded practice). In one line: From accessibility-checklist compliance to requirements-driven design — carrying TWO embedded throughlines (accessibility + data visualization). Character Carries two throughlines that belong together (both are about communicating to a human effectively and honestly). The key transition is B2’s checklist compliance → B8’s designing from others’ needs outward.
